title: PCC vision-promises
description: Owner-approved, plain-language promises capturing a project's original intent, shown as visual cards in the Owner/Visionary Overview. Declared self-assessment, NOT machine proof — declared_status must never be presented as proof (the deterministic Proof Card is separate).

last_reviewed.description: Date the owner last reviewed these promises; null = never reviewed.

declared_status.description: Owner's declared self-assessment. v1 caps at 'built'; locally_proven/independently_proven are reserved for when the evidence-status step ties a promise to a real proof source.
